'''shapatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feasting|feasting]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-p-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feasting|feasting]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shapatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæpæthæth|shæpæthæth]] || [[word:shæpæthæj|shæpæthæj]] || [[word:shæpæthæsh|shæpæthæsh]] || [[word:shæpæthæ|shæpæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shapapathath|shapapathath]] || [[word:shapapathaj|shapapathaj]] || [[word:shapapathash|shapapathash]] || [[word:shapapatha|shapapatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shapathath|shapathath]] || [[word:shapathaj|shapathaj]] || [[word:shapathash|shapathash]] || [[word:shapatha|shapatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shapafthath|shapafthath]] || [[word:shapafthaj|shapafthaj]] || [[word:shapafthash|shapafthash]] || [[word:shapafthaf|shapafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shapathatha|shapathatha]] || [[word:shapathaja|shapathaja]] || [[word:shapathasha|shapathasha]] || [[word:shapathaka|shapathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shapathath|shapathath]] || [[word:shapathaj|shapathaj]] || [[word:shapathash|shapathash]] || [[word:shapatha|shapatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shapathathal|shapathathal]] || [[word:shapathajal|shapathajal]] || [[word:shapathashal|shapathashal]] || [[word:shapathakal|shapathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shapathathatha|shapathathatha]] || [[word:shapathajaja|shapathajaja]] || [[word:shapathashasha|shapathashasha]] || [[word:shapathaka|shapathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shapathathan|shapathathan]] || [[word:shapathajan|shapathajan]] || [[word:shapathashan|shapathashan]] || [[word:shapathakan|shapathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shapathathaoro|shapathathaoro]] || [[word:shapathajaoro|shapathajaoro]] || [[word:shapathashaoro|shapathashaoro]] || [[word:shapathakaoro|shapathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
